title: Design tokens build configuration
description: Drives scripts/tokens.build.mjs (Style Dictionary v5). Declares which DTCG token files to read, how modes (brand/theme/viewport) map to CSS selectors or media queries, and which outputs to generate.

sourceRoot.description: Directory containing the DTCG token JSON files, relative to the repo root (e.g. "src/design-tokens").

header.description: Comment placed at the top of every generated file.

manifest.description: Also emit tokens.manifest.json (one entry per CSS variable: name, collection, category, type, modes) in each output destination.

collections.description: One entry per token collection. Order matters: it drives the manifest order. Each collection can be referenced from other files as {<id>.path.to.token} (or {<prefix>.…} when a prefix is set).

id.description: Unique collection identifier. Used in output filenames (_tokens-<id>.scss) and as the reference key in {…} aliases when no prefix is set.

prefix.description: Prefix prepended to every generated variable name (e.g. "primitives" → --primitives-primary-500). Empty string = no prefix.

preserveCase.description: Keep the original casing of the last path segment instead of kebab-casing the full path (used for SCSS breakpoint variables like $breakpoint-tabletPortrait). Also renders "0px" as "0".

files.description: Token JSON files (DTCG format: nested groups with $value/$type leaves), relative to sourceRoot.

modeAxes.description: How this collection's modes become CSS. Each axis detects a mode from a path segment (e.g. "modeDark" nested in the tree) and wraps the tokens of non-default modes in a selector or media query. Default mode goes to :root.

source.description: Where modes live. "nested": mode names are path segments inside the token tree (e.g. primary.modeBrand2.500). They are stripped from variable names.

strategy.description: "selectors": non-default modes are wrapped in the CSS selector given by map (e.g. [data-theme='dark']). "media": wrapped in @media <condition>.

map.description: mode name → CSS selector (strategy "selectors") or media condition without "@media" (strategy "media").

outputs.description: Files to generate. Each output renders a set of collections with one format into a destination directory. A _tokens.scss index (@use of every partial) is written per destination.

format.description: "css-vars": CSS custom properties in :root + mode selector/media blocks, references kept as var(--…). "scss-vars": flat SCSS variables ($name: value). "composite-styles": composite DTCG tokens (e.g. $type shadow) → one CSS custom property with the composed value + a matching utility class (.<name>).

destination.description: Output directory, relative to the repo root.
